decks.notes: The deck focuses on utilizing a combination of efficient creatures, disruptive spells, and card draw to control the tempo of the game and apply pressure on the opponent. By using cards like Brainstorm, Thoughtseize, and Fatal Push to disrupt the opponent's game plan and creatures like Barrowgoyf and Murktide Regent to apply pressure, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches. Additionally, cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Flow State provide card advantage and additional versatility to maintain control of the game.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast, aggressive creatures while disrupting their game plan with a combination of removal spells and prison effects. Cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Amped Raptor provide a quick clock for the opponent, while Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Static Prison slow down their key plays. Additionally, cards like Swords to Plowshares and Goblin Bombardment offer versatile removal options. The mana base is optimized for consistency and allows for powerful plays like Karakas for protection or Wasteland for land destruction.

The main concept of this deck is to use Cloudpost and Tron lands to ramp up mana quickly, allowing for powerful spells and creatures to be played early in the game. The deck focuses on controlling the board with counterspells like Force of Will and Force of Negation, while also utilizing powerful repeatable effects such as Karn, the Great Creator and The One Ring. The inclusion of Eldrazi Confluence and Kozilek's Command provide additional removal and synergy with the Eldrazi creatures in the deck, creating a versatile and disruptive control strategy.

This Grixis Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy with a combination of counter spells, removal spells, and hand disruption. It also includes card advantage engines like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Snapcaster Mage to maintain a steady flow of resources. The deck aims to control the game by answering threats while slowly grinding out advantage through powerful cards like Baleful Strix and Kolaghan's Command. With a mix of efficient removal, card draw, and powerful threats, this deck seeks to outvalue the opponent and take control of the game.

The main concept of this Legacy Aggro Death's Shadow deck is to quickly lower your own life total to strengthen Death's Shadow while utilizing powerful control elements like Force of Will and Thoughtseize to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to apply early pressure with aggressive creatures like Street Wraith and Moonshadow, backed up by removal spells like Fatal Push and Snuff Out. Utilizing cards like Brazen Borrower and Murktide Regent adds versatility and additional threats to overwhelm the opponent while maintaining control over the game with disruptive spells and efficient card selection from Brainstorm and Ponder.

This legacy deck focuses on assembling the Doomsday combo to win the game. The deck includes cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to generate fast mana for casting Doomsday early. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student helps with card draw and selection, while cards like Brainstorm, Ponder, and Thoughtseize ensure the player can set up their combo efficiently. Thassa's Oracle is part of the win condition, along with Lion's Eye Diamond. The deck also includes interaction like Force of Will and Daze to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's game plan.

This deck focuses on utilizing efficient creatures and disruptive spells to put pressure on the opponent while controlling the board. By using cards like Thoughtseize and Endurance to disrupt the opponent's game plan, and creatures like Wight of the Reliquary and Hogaak, Arisen Necropolis to apply pressure, this Aggro-Maverick deck aims to finish the game quickly. Green Sun's Zenith and Once Upon a Time help find the right creatures when needed, while lands like Gaea's Cradle and Wasteland provide additional utility and mana acceleration.

The main concept of this deck is to play aggressively and disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining tempo through efficient card draw and removal spells. It focuses on using cards like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent to apply pressure on the opponent while using counterspells like Daze and Force of Will to protect your creatures. The deck also includes burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning to deal direct damage to the opponent. By combining aggression, disruption, and card advantage, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure a quick victory.

The deck revolves around aggressively utilizing artifact cards in combination with powerful blue cards to overwhelm the opponent quickly. Emry, Lurker of the Loch is used to recur valuable artifacts, while Kappa Cannoneer and Patchwork Automaton provide additional threats. Chalice of the Void disrupts the opponent's plays, while Urza's Saga allows for quick artifact token generation. The deck aims to control the board with Force of Will and Sink into Stupor, while also ramping up mana with Lotus Petal and Mox Opal. The overall strategy is to outpace the opponent with a mix of artifact aggression and disruption.

The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly with mana dorks like Birds of Paradise and Noble Hierarch, and accelerating into big threats like Craterhoof Behemoth and Atraxa, Grand Unifier. It also utilizes cards like Gaea's Cradle and Natural Order to generate advantage and win the game. The deck also includes control elements such as Endurance and Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's game plan and maintain board control. Ultimately, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent through efficient creature-based strategies and powerful spells.

The main idea of this deck is to assemble the Dark Depths combo by utilizing cards like Thespian's Stage, Crop Rotation, and Sylvan Reclaimer. The deck also includes powerful land-based creatures like Knight of the Reliquary and Ramunap Excavator to support the overall strategy. In addition, there are disruptive cards like Collector Ouphe and Gaddock Teeg to disrupt opponents' game plans. The deck aims to quickly assemble the combo while controlling the board with removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and disruptive lands like Wasteland.

The main concept of this deck is to maintain constant pressure on the opponent by playing aggressive creatures like Dauthi Voidwalker and Murktide Regent while disrupting their strategy with counterspells like Force of Will and Daze. The deck aims to control the pace of the game with cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push, preventing the opponent from stabilizing. By using Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to draw cards and Brainstorm to set up the top of the deck, the Dimir Tempo deck seeks to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the Dredge mechanic to quickly fill the graveyard with key creatures and cards, such as Golgari Grave-Troll and Bridge from Below, in order to achieve a powerful combo finish. By combining cards like Faithless Looting and Otherworldly Gaze to cycle through the deck and dredge creatures into the graveyard, the deck aims to create a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of creatures. The deck also includes disruption elements like Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's game plan while building towards its own win condition.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay while also utilizing the Maverick archetype to disrupt the opponent's strategies. By ramping up mana with cards like Noble Hierarch and Gaea's Cradle, it aims to quickly bring out powerful creatures like Wight of the Reliquary and Endurance. The deck also includes disruption cards like Collector Ouphe and Thoughtseize to control the opponent's resources. With a balance of speed, control, and powerful threats, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to establish a lock on the game using powerful artifacts like Trinisphere and Karn, the Great Creator. By utilizing cards like Candelabra of Tawnos and Grim Monolith to generate mana, the deck aims to control the board with cards like Planar Nexus and Ugin, the Eye of the Storms. Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Cityscape Leveler serve as win conditions, while Pithing Needle and Disruptor Flute help to disrupt opponent strategies. The goal is to create a prison-like effect for the opponent and overpower them with powerful artifact cards.

The deck focuses on locking down the opponent's options through a combination of artifacts and control elements. By utilizing cards like Trinisphere, Pithing Needle, and Karn, the Great Creator, the deck disrupts the opponent's strategy while also ramping up its own mana production with cards like Grim Monolith and Urza's lands. With the ability to eventually bring out powerful threats like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Ugin, Eye of the Storms, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its superior board presence and control.
